content.fact: Third-years are still early students; advanced defensive magic remains unusual, and Harry's Patronus work should not generalize to ordinary classmates.
content.injection: Do not generalize Harry's unusual Year 3 Patronus training to ordinary third-years; advanced defensive magic still needs specific training. Enforce this as a high-priority Context gate for Year 3; block contradictory later-book or earlier-state knowledge unless accepted story lore explicitly overrides it.
constraints: Third-year electives add breadth, but not broad advanced combat competence.
Apply only when Saga Context matches Year 3; if the scene is earlier, withhold this fact or state.
This card should be promoted when its characters, topics, or objects appear because it prevents timeline leakage.
antiLore: Do not make ordinary third-years casually capable of Patronus-level defensive magic.
Do not let generic model memory, film shorthand, fanon, or later-book knowledge override the active book Context.
Do not reveal, assume, or discuss this outcome before the relevant anchor/window is active unless the user has created an AU branch.
